steps.title: Trace the passage structure
steps.content: The text begins with general interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects, narrows to Ramirez's study of microbial communities near wooden shipwrecks, and ends with one finding.

steps.title: Reject invented structure
steps.content: A invents a focus on the wood used to build the Ericsson, B invents historical significance, and D invents scholarly attention and a later team reaction. The accurate structure is broad ecological interest, one related study, and a reported finding. The answer is C.
